# Deprecated Directory: Cloud Functions

This directory (`functions/`) in the `librebook_flutter` repository is deprecated and no longer maintained. 

**DO NOT edit, add, or deploy Cloud Functions from this directory.**

## Canonical Source of Truth
The Cloud Functions for the entire Librebook application (mobile, web, and admin apps) are now managed and deployed exclusively from the TypeScript workspace in the sibling `librebook` repository:

[C:\Users\user\librebook\functions](file:///C:/Users/user/librebook/functions)

If you are an AI assistant or human developer, please switch to the `librebook` workspace to modify any backend functionality.
